mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cage_shelf_index ( campus_id, campus_name, area_id, area_name, floor_id, floor_name, room_id, room_name, shelve_id, shelve_name, orders, deleted ) VALUES ( #{campusId}, #{campusName}, #{areaId}, #{areaName}, #{floorId}, #{floorName}, #{roomId}, #{roomName}, #{shelveId}, #{shelveName}, #{orders}, 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE campus_id = VALUES(campus_id), campus_name = VALUES(campus_name), area_id = VALUES(area_id), area_name = VALUES(area_name), floor_id = VALUES(floor_id), floor_name = VALUES(floor_name), room_id = VALUES(room_id), room_name = VALUES(room_name), shelve_name = VALUES(shelve_name), orders = VALUES(orders), deleted = 0, update_time = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE cage_shelf_index SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT campus_id AS campusId, campus_name AS campusName FROM cage_shelf_index WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY campus_id, campus_name ORDER BY campus_id ASC
SELECT CAST(area_id AS CHAR) AS areaId, area_name AS areaName FROM cage_shelf_index WHERE deleted = 0 AND campus_id = #{campusId} GROUP BY area_id, area_name ORDER BY area_id ASC
SELECT * FROM cage_shelf_index WHERE CAST(shelve_id AS CHAR) = #{shelveId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT CAST(campus_id AS CHAR) AS campusId, campus_name AS campusName, CAST(area_id AS CHAR) AS areaId, area_name AS areaName, CAST(floor_id AS CHAR) AS floorId, floor_name AS floorName, CAST(room_id AS CHAR) AS roomId, room_name AS roomName, CAST(shelve_id AS CHAR) AS shelveId, shelve_name AS shelveName, orders, DATE_FORMAT(update_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updateTime FROM cage_shelf_index WHERE deleted = 0 AND campus_id = #{campusId} AND CAST(area_id AS CHAR) = #{areaId} AND CAST(floor_id AS CHAR) = #{floorId} AND CAST(room_id AS CHAR) = #{roomId} ORDER BY campus_id, area_id, floor_id, room_id, shelve_id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
